# Lucide Angular llms.txt reference

This file is a quick machine-readable reference for `@lucide/angular` (Lucide v1 RC). It mirrors the format used by `.animated-icons` in this repo.

## Project snapshot

- Package name: `@lucide/angular`
- Version in repo: `^1.0.0-rc.0`
- Homepage: `https://lucide.dev/`
- Repository: `https://github.com/lucide-icons/lucide`
- License: MIT
- Framework: Angular standalone components (signals-first)
- Peer dependencies: `@angular/core` `17.x - 21.x`, `@angular/common` `17.x - 21.x`

## Installation

- `npm install @lucide/angular`
- `pnpm add @lucide/angular`
- `yarn add @lucide/angular`
- `bun add @lucide/angular`

## Basic usage

Standalone icon import:

- `import { LucideCarrot } from '@lucide/angular';`
- `@Component({ imports: [LucideCarrot], template: '<svg lucideCarrot></svg>' })` 

Dynamic icons:

- `import { LucideDynamicIcon, LucideCircleCheck, LucideCircleX } from '@lucide/angular';`
- `template: '<svg [lucideIcon]="icon()"></svg>'`

## Icon API

All Lucide icons implement:

- `title` (string | null)
- `size` (number | string, default `24`)
- `color` (string, default `currentColor`)
- `strokeWidth` (number, default `2`)
- `absoluteStrokeWidth` (boolean, default `false`)

Accessibility:

- `title` adds an SVG `<title>` element and removes `aria-hidden`.
- If no title is provided, `aria-hidden="true"` is added automatically.
- For interactive icons, pair with button/aria-label on the interactive parent.

## Utility exports

- `LucideIconBase` (abstract base class)
- `LucideDynamicIcon` (runtime icon lookup by component definition)
- `isLucideIconComponent`, `isLucideIconData` type guards

## Component naming conventions

- Angular component class names are PascalCase with `Lucide` prefix.
- Template attribute selectors are `lucide<IconName>` (camelCase after prefix).
- Example: `LucideFileText` -> `<svg lucideFileText></svg>`.

## Existing icons (export counts)

- Total component icons exported: **1686** (as of currently installed package).
- A sample subset (first 150 names):
  - LucideAArrowDown
  - LucideALargeSmall
  - LucideAArrowUp
  - LucideAccessibility
  - LucideActivity
  - LucideAirVent
  - LucideAirplay
  - LucideAlarmClockCheck

  - LucideAlarmClockPlus
  - LucideAlarmClockOff
  - LucideAlarmSmoke
  - LucideAlignCenterHorizontal
  - LucideAlignCenterVertical
  - LucideAlarmClockMinus
  - LucideAlbum
  - LucideAlignHorizontalDistributeCenter
  - LucideAlignEndVertical
  - LucideAlignHorizontalDistributeEnd
  - LucideAlignEndHorizontal
  - LucideAlignHorizontalDistributeStart
  - LucideAlignHorizontalJustifyCenter
  - LucideAlignHorizontalSpaceAround
  - LucideAlignHorizontalJustifyStart
  - LucideAlignHorizontalJustifyEnd
  - LucideAlignHorizontalSpaceBetween
  - LucideAlignStartHorizontal
  - LucideAlignStartVertical
  - LucideAlignVerticalDistributeEnd
  - LucideAlignVerticalDistributeStart
  - LucideAlignVerticalJustifyCenter
  - LucideAlignVerticalDistributeCenter
  - LucideAlignVerticalJustifyEnd
  - LucideAmbulance
  - LucideAmpersand
  - LucideAlignVerticalSpaceAround
  - LucideAmpersands
  - LucideAmphora
  - LucideAnchor
  - LucideAnnoyed
  - LucideAngry
  - LucideAlignVerticalJustifyStart
  - LucideAntenna
  - LucideAnvil
  - LucideAperture
  - LucideAppWindow
  - LucideAppWindowMac
  - LucideArchiveRestore
  - LucideArchiveX
  - LucideArchive
  - LucideApple
  - ... (and 1,636 more)

## Notes

- Prefer using tree-shakeable per-component imports to keep bundle size minimal.
- For massive icon sets in dynamic lists, use `LucideDynamicIcon` and avoid importing all icons at once.
- Keep code consistent with existing repo usage of `@lucide/angular` in `frontend/src/app/shared/components/stats-grid/stats-grid.component.ts`.
